versions.name: Camp Oh-Da-Ko-Ta - First Year Camper Program
versions.summary: Overnight First Year Camper program in Burlington, Wisconsin, from Three Harbors Council for new Scouts BSA, helping participants work toward Tenderfoot, Second Class, and First Class requirements along with up to two merit badges.

provenance.notes: Imported from camp-finder; raw description and sessions dropped (operational data stays at the council site). The evergreen summary is original prose regenerated from that description, excluding dates/fees/schedules. camp_type classified from program_types.
